proposals.title: Close Inactive Market (Osmosis ATOM)
proposals.summary:
## Summary  

  This proposal concerns the closure of the Osmosis ATOM market on the Nolus Pirin (mainnet), which has remained inactive and is no longer serving user demand within the Nolus money market. The closure process is structured to ensure the safe return of user funds and to streamline the protocol by retiring underutilized components.  

  The action will proceed in two steps:  

  **1. Automatic Return of Deposits:** Any remaining deposits in the lending pool will be automatically distributed back to the corresponding lenders. This guarantees that all users are made whole and that no funds remain in the pool.  

  **2. Market Closure:** Following the distribution of funds, the Osmosis ATOM market will be fully closed. Users will no longer be able to deposit into the lending pool or open new positions against Osmosis ATOM.  

  This measure eliminates maintenance overhead for an inactive market and prepares the protocol for focusing resources on active and strategically valuable markets.  

  By voting "YES" on this proposal, you consent to the automatic distribution of remaining Osmosis ATOM deposits to lenders and the full closure of this market as a follow-up action.

proposals.title: Update Oracle Swap Tree (Osmosis Noble USDC)
proposals.summary:
## Summary 
 This proposal seeks to optimize the Oracle swap tree for the Osmosis USDC protocol, improving the efficiency of swap routes for assets used in margin trading on the Nolus protocol. The key updates are as follows: 
 * **Delist Pools:** We propose to delist the following assets from the Oracle due to lack of open positions and thin liquidity on Osmosis: INJ, allSOL, BABY, AXL, SCRT, CRO. 

 By voting "YES" on this proposal, you support enhancing the Osmosis USDC Oracle swap tree to reflect these updated routes, thereby improving performance and cost-effectiveness for margin trading on Nolus.

proposals.title: Close Inactive Market (Osmosis axlUSDC)
proposals.summary:
## Summary 

 This proposal proposes the closure of the Osmosis axlUSDC long market due to zero active positions on mainnet. The closure process is structured to ensure the safe return of user funds and to streamline the protocol by retiring underutilized components. 

 The action will proceed in two steps: 
 **1. Automatic Return of Deposits:** The existing deposits, currently amounting to roughly 52.33k axlUSDC, will be automatically distributed back to the corresponding lenders. This guarantees that all users are made whole and that no funds remain in the lending pool. 
 2. **Market Closure:** Following the distribution of funds, the Osmosis axlUSDC long market will be fully closed. Users will no longer be able to deposit into the lending pool or open margin long positions there. 

 This measure eliminates maintenance overhead for an inactive market and prepares the protocol for focusing resources on active and strategically valuable markets. 

 By voting "YES" on this proposal, you consent to the automatic distribution of remaining Osmosis axlUSDC deposits to lenders and the full closure of this long market as a follow-up action.

proposals.title: Smart Contract Migration for Osmosis axlUSDC Deprecation
proposals.summary:
## Summary 

 As the Nolus network adopts a semi-permissioned blockchain model, contract migrations require governance approval. The Nolus money market architecture is strategically divided into two main components: the platform core and the protocol core. The platform core houses essential contracts that function universally across various chains without specific modifications for each chain. Conversely, the protocol core is designed for flexibility, allowing for the creation of unique contract instances tailored to each integrated chain, such as Osmosis, Neutron, and others anticipated in the future. This strategic separation ensures that Nolus can scale efficiently while minimizing maintenance overhead. 

 This proposal introduces a migration that is only relevant to the Osmosis axlUSDC market, which is already deprecated in the UI for end users: 
 * **Market Deprecation:** Prepares the market for full deprecation. This step swaps contract code only. No funds are moved and no balances change. A follow-up proposal will conclude the delisting process for this market and return all leftover deposits to the lenders in full. 

 For more details, please refer to the published [issue](https://github.com/nolus-protocol/nolus-money-market/issues/654) on GitHub. 

 By voting "YES" on this proposal, you consent to the migration of only the Leaser, LPP and Reserve contracts of this single Osmosis axlUSDC market. The remaining markets remain untouched.
